diagnosis.final_diagnosis: ELANE and MEFV mutation positive severe cyclic neutropenia
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient was diagnosed with cyclic neutropenia (CyN) at age one and had a history of multiple severe infections and hospitalizations. Testing revealed a heterozygous frame-shift deletion mutation in the ELANE gene and a positive MEFV mutation. The combination of these mutations was hypothesized to contribute to the severity of symptoms, leading to the decision for allogeneic bone marrow transplantation.
